channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Multiple Shootings Reported Across Mali as Security Situation Remains Unstable
item.description: Heavy gunfire shake several parts of Mali on Saturday, including Kati, wey be the stronghold of military ruler General Assimi Goita. Witnesses and security sources confirm say fighting also happen for...

item.title: Man arrested after fire at LGBT+ nightclub in Milton Keynes
item.description: A man has been arrested on suspicion of arson with intent to endanger life following a blaze at the Pink Punters nightclub in Fenny Stratford, Milton Keynes. The fire broke out in the early hours of S...

item.title: Wike’s aide accuses Makinde of VP ambition and inciting political tension
item.description: Lere Olayinka, wey be Senior Special Assistant on Public Communications and Social Media to FCT Minister Nyesom Wike, don openly criticise Oyo State Governor Seyi Makinde, accusing am of chasing vice-...

item.title: PDP Faction Denies Involvement in Ibadan Opposition Summit Declaration
item.description: A serious drama dey play out for PDP o! A faction loyal to Minister Nyesom Wike, dem don sharply reject the declaration wey come out from the Ibadan opposition summit. Dis group, wey dey led by former...

item.title: Pittsburgh Steelers 2026 Draft: Day Three Selections and Options
item.description: The Pittsburgh Steelers are heading into Day Three of the 2026 NFL Draft with five remaining picks. While the team has already filled many needs, it has several options to complete its rookie class. T...

item.title: NARD Suspends Strike After FG Assures Payment of Arrears and Allowances
item.description: The Nigerian Association of Resident Doctors (NARD) don suspend their planned indefinite strike after the Federal Government don reverse the decision wey dey halt the reviewed Professional Allowance T...

item.title: Residents evacuated after car bomb detonates near Dunmurry police station
item.description: In Dunmurry, a suburb of Belfast, a car bomb exploded near a local police station, prompting an urgent evacuation of nearby residents, including families with young children. Emergency services respon...

item.title: Trump responds to attempted attack at White House Correspondents' dinner
item.description: A dramatic incident unfolded during the annual White House Correspondents' dinner at the Washington Hilton when a gunman attempted to storm the event, armed with multiple weapons, including knives and...

item.title: Ship Fire in Newport Dock: 1,000 Tonnes of Scrap Metal Involved
item.description: Firefighters are currently battling a significant blaze onboard the Nord Houston, a ship docked at Newport Dock in South Wales. The fire, which broke out at approximately 05:40 BST on Sunday, involves...

item.title: FG, finance and aviation ministers discuss measures to reduce airline operating costs in Nigeria
item.description: Federal Government don begin fresh effort to tackle the serious cost wahala wey airlines for Nigeria dey face, especially because of aviation fuel price wey no dey stable. This matter come up after Mi...

item.title: 82-year-old crash survivor plans 24-hour water-walking challenge to raise funds for charity
item.description: Tony Fahey, an 82-year-old grandfather from Manchester, is preparing to undertake a 24-hour endurance challenge on water in an effort to raise £1 million for the children’s charity Make-A-Wish. Nearly...

item.title: Jodi Sta. Maria Sends Birthday Greetings to Luis Manzano
item.description: ABS-CBN recently shared a glimpse of Jodi Sta. Maria’s heartfelt birthday message for Luis Manzano. The online article, published on April 26, 2026, indicates that Jodi likely delivered this message d...

item.title: NDLEA Seizes Captagon, Cocaine, and Other Drugs Across Multiple States in Nigeria
item.description: NDLEA don make serious interceptions of dangerous drugs across Nigeria. For Kwara State, dem catch 10,000 Captagon pills plus nine packets of Tapentadol from one passenger, Nasiru Mu’azu, during routi...

item.title: CCT Staff Allege Misconduct by Chairman Kogo, Including Nepotism and Document Manipulation
item.description: The staff of the Code of Conduct Tribunal (CCT) don carry matter serious well well against their Chairman, Mainasara Umar Ibrahim Kogo. Dem claim say him dey involved for altering official documents s...

item.title: Three Katsina District Heads Declare Interest for National Assembly Seats in 2027
item.description: For Katsina State, one unusual development don show face as three district heads openly declare say dem wan contest for National Assembly positions for 2027 general elections. The people wey dey invol...

item.title: Luis Manzano reacts to Melai Cantiveros’ heartfelt birthday message on Kapamilya Deal Or No Deal
item.description: Sa isang episode ng “Kapamilya Deal Or No Deal,” naging sentro ng atensyon si Luis Manzano matapos siyang makatanggap ng espesyal na birthday message mula sa matalik niyang kaibigan na si Melai Cantiv...

item.title: Suspect in White House Correspondents' Dinner Shooting Likely Targeted Trump Administration Officials
item.description: A suspect has been arrested following a shooting incident at the White House Correspondents' Dinner, held at the Washington Hilton. The suspect, identified as Cole Tomas Allen, 31, from Torrance, Cali...

item.title: Chukwudi Dimkpa Emerges ADC Chairman in Rivers After Statewide Consensus Congress
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) for Rivers State don conduct one major state congress wey lead to the emergence of Chukwudi Dimkpa as the new chairman-elect of the party. Dimkpa, wey be former M...

item.title: Jim Iyke Raises Concern About Internal Challenges Slowing Nollywood Growth
item.description: Popular Nollywood actor Jim Iyke don open up about some of the serious problems wey dey affect the Nigerian film industry, and according to am, many of these issues dey come from inside the industry i...

item.title: Comic Relief: The Beginnings of a British Comedy Phenomenon
item.description: Comic Relief, the iconic British charity telethon, began 40 years ago as an unconventional and chaotic comedy event at London’s Shaftesbury Theatre. The idea of combining comedy and charity was inspir...
